content.text:
I'm ready to help you with the Neuman Brain project. I've reviewed the project constitution and I'm prepared to work according to the established protocols.

Let me start the session properly:

<bash id="main_merge">
git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main --no-edit
</bash>

<bash id="recent_commits">
git log -3 --oneline
</bash>

<bash id="check_tasks">
ls tasks/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo "No task files found"
</bash>

Now I'm ready. What would you like to work on today? You can describe what you need naturally, and I'll route it to the optimal workflow (planning, debugging, implementation, etc.) based on the complexity and type of work.
